admissionPolicies.verificationProcess: Manual entry must match uploaded marksheet verbatim. Any discrepancy results in immediate automatic disqualification without notice.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for the Special Engineering batch?
faqs.answer: The minimum aggregate score required is 60%. This is calculated based on your top 5 academic subjects from the uploaded 12th marksheet.

faqs.question: When will I get my exam details?
faqs.answer: Once your application is 100% complete and our Eligibility Engine verifies your marks, you will receive an automated email with your login credentials for the University Entrance Portal.
